name: Solana ZK Verifier (Groth16 on-chain)
description: Verify custom Groth16/SNARK proofs on-chain on Solana via groth16-solana / alt_bn128: proof & VK serialization (A-negation, G2 c0/c1 order, big-endian, public-input order), embedding and KAT-pinning the verifying key, isolating many circuits by VK+arity, compute-budget limits with measured CU, and honest trusted-setup guidance. Routes ZK-compression to Light, confidential transfers to Token-2022, and formal verification to qedgen.
safety: clean — documentation-only skill (Markdown); install.sh only copies files, runs no executables, makes no network calls, and uses no env vars or secrets
